name: Knockout Jawbreaker
description: Knockout Jawbreaker is the November 2014 counterpart of the Tech Trap Master, Jawbreaker, in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Knockout Jawbreaker is the November 2014 counterpart of the Tech Trap Master, Jawbreaker, in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
quote: Knockout Jawbreaker has left the ring and stepped into Skylands!
personality: As a counterpart to Jawbreaker, he likely shares a similar sense of duty and power, now geared specifically for boxing knockout power.

story.content: Knockout Jawbreaker is the November 2014 counterpart of the Tech Trap Master, Jawbreaker, in Skylanders: Lost Islands.

content: Knockout Jawbreaker has left the ring and stepped into Skylands!

trivia: He is the first Lost Islands exclusive Skylander to be a Trap Master.
'Knockout' was also used for the Series 3 counterpart of Terrafin.
gameplay: Knockout Jawbreaker was released as an exclusive Alter Ego in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
